item.title: LEGO DUPLO Peppa Pig Garden and Tree House Toy Includes 2 Figures Educational Toddler Learning Toys for 2 Plus Year Old Girls & Boys Birthday Gift Idea 10431
item.description:
You can find LEGO DUPLO Peppa Pig Garden and Tree House Toy Includes 2 Figures Educational Toddler Learning Toys for 2 Plus Year Old Girls & Boys Birthday Gift Idea 10431 with a discount here:

ℹ️:

  • Educational toys for 2+ year-olds – LEGO DUPLO toddler toys support fine motor skills and emotional development through fun-filled playtimes
  • Toddler learning toys – Nurture kids’ caring instincts as they help the flowers grow with the LEGO DUPLO Peppa Pig Garden and Tree House toy playset
  • Creative toy grows imaginations – Toddlers reimagine scenes from the Peppa Pig TV show as they explore the garden and care for the toy plant
  • Fun with Peppa Pig characters – The Peppa Pig figures hide in the trunk or relax in the branches of the tree house toy, which has a hinged window
  • Packed with play starters – This Peppa Pig toy comes with 2 Peppa Pig figures, a watering can, gardening fork, packet of seeds and a tree house toy
  • Gift for toddlers – Delight a little fan of the Peppa Pig show on a birthday or other special occasion with this building toy, which makes a fun Peppa Pig-themed gift for 2+-year-old kids, girls and boys

🛒 Buy it!!

Check the price of this item in other countries:

item.title: LEGO Super Mario Picnic at Mario s House Expansion Set Buildable Toy with Yellow Yoshi Figure Gift Idea for Kids Boys Girls Aged 6 Plus Combine with Starter Course 71422
item.description:
There’s a deal LEGO Super Mario Picnic at Mario s House Expansion Set Buildable Toy with Yellow Yoshi Figure Gift Idea for Kids Boys Girls Aged 6 Plus Combine with Starter Course 71422 here:

ℹ️:

  • The toy house is full of interactive features; Super Mario characters can sleep, eat biscuits, “water” vegetables from the garden and play hockey
  • LEGO Super Mario extension set is designed to add more fun to starter courses (71360, 71387 or 71403), which are required for interactive play
  • Kids place LEGO Mario, LEGO Luigi or LEGO Peach (figures not included) on the toy boat to fish and wave to Yellow Yoshi to trigger reactions
  • Download the LEGO Super Mario companion app for digital instructions to inspire childrens imaginations and enhance the buildable game experience
  • This 259-piece LEGO Super Mario Mario toy set makes a great birthday gift for kids, boys and girls aged 6+ who love Super Mario characters and buildable toys
  • Kids aged 6+ can expand their LEGO Super Mario buildable game with the Picnic at Marios House Expansion Set, complete with a Yellow Yoshi figure

🛒 Buy it now!!
